to see (sb) off

[tiễn] to see/show somebody out 
 Khỏi tiễn, tôi tự đi được mà 
 I'll see/show myself out 
 Để tôi tiễn anh ra xe 
 I'll see you to your car 
 Tiễn ai ra cửa 
 To see/show somebody to the door 
 Tiễn ai ra ga 
 To see somebody to the station; 
 To see somebody off at the station
